{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Damascan Calendar (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The current year is the [[358th Year of the Damascan Calendar]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
